meaning: to return to the same school and repeat a course from which one has al
sentence: 他高考没发挥好，决定复读一年。
pinyin: Tā gāokǎo méi fāhuī hǎo, juédìng fù dú yī nián.
english: He didn't do well on the college entrance exam and decided to repeat the year.

meaning: first (hotel of its type, store of its type etc)
sentence: 这是城里首家专卖素食的餐厅。
pinyin: Zhè shì chéng lǐ shǒu jiā zhuān mài sùshí de cāntīng.
english: This is the first restaurant in town dedicated to vegetarian food.

sentence: 两人相视一笑，什么都不用说了。
pinyin: Liǎng rén xiāng shì yī xiào, shénme dōu bù yòng shuō le.
english: The two of them looked at each other and smiled — no words were needed.

sentence: 爷爷曾经是一名志愿军战士。
pinyin: Yéye céngjīng shì yī míng zhì yuàn jūn zhànshì.
english: Grandpa was once a volunteer army soldier.

sentence: 她入行多年，对娱乐圈的规则很了解。
pinyin: Tā rùháng duō nián, duì yú lè quān de guīzé hěn liǎojiě.
english: She's been in the industry for many years and knows the rules of show business well.
